title: post api urls create shortened url
description: Test creating a new shortened URL with valid original_url, optional custom_alias, and optional future expires_at. Verify 201 response with correct short_code and short_url.

title: get api urls list urls with pagination
description: Test listing all shortened URLs with skip and limit query parameters. Verify 200 response with a list of URLResponse objects.

title: get api urls short code retrieve url metadata
description: Test retrieving URL metadata by short_code. Verify 200 response with URLResponse if found, or 404 if not found.

title: patch api urls short code update url properties
description: Test updating URL properties such as original_url, expires_at, and is_active by short_code. Verify 200 response with updated URLResponse or 404 if not found.

title: delete api urls short code soft delete url
description: Test soft-deleting a URL by short_code, setting is_active to false. Verify 204 No Content response or 404 if not found.

title: get short code redirect to original url
description: Test redirecting a valid active short_code to its original_url with HTTP 307 and recording a click event. Verify 404 for nonexistent codes and 410 for expired or deactivated URLs.

title: get api urls short code analytics aggregated summary
description: Test retrieving aggregated analytics summary for a short_code with optional start_date and end_date filters. Verify 200 response with correct analytics data or 404 if URL not found.

title: get api urls short code clicks list raw click events
description: Test listing raw click events for a short_code with pagination parameters skip and limit. Verify 200 response with ClickEventResponse array or 404 if URL not found.

title: get api urls short code qr generate qr code png
description: Test generating a QR code PNG image for a short_code with optional size parameter (1-40). Verify 200 response with image/png content or 404 if URL not found.

title: get health check application status
description: Test the health check endpoint to verify application availability. Verify 200 response with JSON status healthy.
